{{Quote|Gravity's silhouette remains, but the star and all the planets, disappeared they have. How can this be?|Yoda|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
'''Casna Besh''' was the tenth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kamino system/Legends|Kamino system]]. It was an enormous [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a staggering 43 [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and captured wandering [[Comet/Legends|comets]] and [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] at a rate of roughly two every [[Millennium/Legends|millennium]].
